name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 11 Jun 2024
body: [{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW:","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In this release, we have launched a new segment category in our newly refurbished Next Generation Segment Builder."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Kindly read ahead to know more!! "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"ENHANCEMENT:","bold":true}]},{"type":"h4","children":[{"text":"A NEW SEGMENT CATEGORY","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"We have added a new category in our Next Generation Segment Builder known as “"},{"text":"Email Activity\"","bold":true},{"text":"."},{"text":" ","bold":true},{"text":"This lets you fetch contacts who have either received or interacted with your email campaigns."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"There are 4 segment rules clubbed in this segment category. They are, namely, "},{"text":"Was Sent Emails, Received Emails, Opened Emails, ","bold":true},{"text":"and"},{"text":" Clicked Emails","bold":true},{"text":". Such criteria enable you to construct segments, which you can subsequently utilize to send personalized campaigns to such contacts."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Below is a layout of the email activity rulesets and their attributes on the Next Generation Segment Builder page."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/segment35.068J1000001W8hPIAS.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/segment35.068J1000001W8hPIAS.png","name":"segment35","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":3476,"width":2758}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more about such rulesets being applied during segment creation, read our "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Segment-Rules-in-Next-Gen-Segment-Builder","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Segment Rule (Next-Generation)","bold":true}]},{"text":" article. In addition to segment rules, read our "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Creating-Segments-with-Next-Gen-Segment-Builder","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Creating Segments with Next-Gen Segment Builder","bold":true}]},{"text":" article to understand the basic guidelines for creating a segment."}]}]}]
